देवभूमि माँ गंगा स्वयंसेवी चैरिटेबल ट्रस्ट (Devbhoomi Maa Ganga Swayam Sevi Charitable Trust) "Dedicated to the spirit of the Himalayas, Devbhoomi Maa Ganga Swayam Sevi Charitable Trust operates at the intersection of social welfare and environmental conservation. From the banks of Rishikesh to the high ridges of Tehri Garhwal, we are transforming rural lives through health initiatives, women’s empowerment, and a steadfast commitment to keeping the Ganges clean and our villages vibrant." Vision: To create self-reliant rural communities in the Garhwal Himalayas where every individual has access to quality education, healthcare, and sustainable livelihood opportunities while preserving the sanctity of Mother Ganga. Mission: To empower the marginalized sections of Tehri Garhwal through grassroots-level interventions in skill development, environmental conservation, and women’s empowerment.
